comments.comment: This seems to be the foundational definition of the Librarian persona. You could elaborate on how the Librarian adapts responses or interfaces dynamically with user behavior.
Consider clarifying how this onboarding integrates with user flow—what makes it brief but effective?
It would help to specify where these reminders appear, how often, and whether users can disable them to avoid overload.
